title: Arrange transport for farm produce or livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Arrange transport for farm produce or livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm transport requirements

pcs.text: Confirm transport requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm transport requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm transport requirements according to workplace marketing and production plans.

pcs.text: Confirm amount and type of farm produce and number of livestock to be transported, the pick-up or delivery requirements, and the route to be taken according to workplace instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm amount and type of farm produce and number of livestock to be transported, the pick-up or delivery requirements, and the route to be taken according to workplace instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm amount and type of farm produce and number of livestock to be transported, the pick-up or delivery requirements, and the route to be taken according to workplace instructions.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with legislative requirements associated with the transport of farm produce or livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with legislative requirements associated with the transport of farm produce or livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with legislative requirements associated with the transport of farm produce or livestock.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm transport requirements

elements.title: Prepare transport plan

pcs.text: Determine equipment, vehicles and resources required to transport farm produce or livestock, and arrange according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine equipment, vehicles and resources required to transport farm produce or livestock, and arrange according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine equipment, vehicles and resources required to transport farm produce or livestock, and arrange according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify, seek and obtain relevant authorisations, permits or animal identification requirements according to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, seek and obtain relevant authorisations, permits or animal identification requirements according to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, seek and obtain relevant authorisations, permits or animal identification requirements according to legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Document transport arrangements including pick-up and delivery details, and any requirement to unload livestock to allow for spelling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document transport arrangements including pick-up and delivery details, and any requirement to unload livestock to allow for spelling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document transport arrangements including pick-up and delivery details, and any requirement to unload livestock to allow for spelling.

pcs.text: Document conditions to be maintained for produce, including separation for product integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document conditions to be maintained for produce, including separation for product integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document conditions to be maintained for produce, including separation for product integrity.

pcs.text: Negotiate compensation or penalties for damage to produce or livestock, or obtain transport insurance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate compensation or penalties for damage to produce or livestock, or obtain transport insurance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate compensation or penalties for damage to produce or livestock, or obtain transport insurance.

pcs.text: Ensure plan complies with workplace and legislative requirements for workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure plan complies with workplace and legislative requirements for workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure plan complies with workplace and legislative requirements for workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare transport plan

elements.title: Source and select carrier

pcs.text: Source carriers to ascertain availability, terms and conditions according to transport and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source carriers to ascertain availability, terms and conditions according to transport and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source carriers to ascertain availability, terms and conditions according to transport and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Contact carriers who satisfy the transport requirements to negotiate suitable costs, terms and cartage conditions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contact carriers who satisfy the transport requirements to negotiate suitable costs, terms and cartage conditions.

pcs.text: Select carrier and confirm negotiations with an agreement and insurance arrangements prepared accordingly

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select carrier and confirm negotiations with an agreement and insurance arrangements prepared accordingly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Source and select carrier

elements.title: Coordinate transport arrangement

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure completion and accuracy of relevant documentation according to industry and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Communicate regularly with operational staff and contractors to confirm clarity and understanding of arrangements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate regularly with operational staff and contractors to confirm clarity and understanding of arrangements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate regularly with operational staff and contractors to confirm clarity and understanding of arrangements.

pcs.text: Check and confirm scheduling arrangements and preparation of farm produce or livestock in readiness for transportation with workplace personnel

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm scheduling arrangements and preparation of farm produce or livestock in readiness for transportation with workplace personnel.
